creator: trociny@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

devel/netbsd-pkgsrc-mk-files is not a port of pkgsrc. It contains 
only some mk files from this project. It was added to the tree 
because devel/mk-configure depended on it. Later the author of 
mk-configure (who also the author of netbsd-pkgsrc-mk-files) 
removed this dependency and has not been updating 
netbsd-pkgsrc-mk-files since then. 

I am going to remove devel/netbsd-pkgsrc-mk-files from the ports 
tree. 

Dewayne, if you think it is a good idea to have pkgsrc in the 
ports, and there would be users of it (you among them), feel free 
to submit the port.
